result.status_detail: Phase 1 daglo baseline. PRIMARY URL daglo.ai REACHABLE from KR. Korean AI service (originally STT, expanded to multi-feature). Landing page shows 4 AI products: AI 유튜브요약 (YouTube summary), AI 채팅 (Chat — text input target), AI 문서번역 (Document translation), AI 문서작성 (Document writing — 준비중/coming soon). 'AI 채팅' is the relevant entry point for text prompt testing. Clicking '무료로 시작하기' (Start free) redirects to daglo.ai/sign-in — LOGIN REQUIRED (Email/password OR SNS: Naver/Kakao/Google/Apple). Anonymous mode NOT supported. APF testing blocked at auth gate.
result.fallback_urls_tried: primary URL worked, fallbacks not needed
result.previous_classification: APF NOT YET REGISTERED — Phase 1 probe (originally classified as STT-only)
result.note_originally_stt: Service has expanded BEYOND STT-only — now multi-feature including text AI chat. Original 'STT-only' classification is outdated.
result.next_phase_recommendation: (1) Register daglo with login-required flag. (2) Provision test account (email or SNS) to access AI 채팅. (3) Once logged in, capture endpoint pattern for AI 채팅 (likely SSE based on similar Korean services). (4) STT (audio) handling remains separate concern — may need audio-uploader or different APF policy.

notes: Batch F-19 daglo Phase 1 probe. Service architecture: multi-modal AI (originally STT, now also text chat / YouTube summary / translation). LOGIN GATE blocks anonymous testing. Korean SNS auth (Naver/Kakao primary). Recommended for registration but requires test credentials before APF can be applied.
